rows: You were a taxi driver before all this shit! You were just trying to make ends meet and pay the bills driving a cab and minding your own business. One night in the San Diego Gaslamp District, you picked up a fair, thinking nothing of it, and they proceeded to get rather...friendly, you know. Then things got weird. All you know is that there was blood everywhere, literally everywhere, and maybe you blacked out, or perhaps you just shut it all out, because you woke up the next morning feeling like you had the worst hangover known to human kind and there was blood all over the seats. It took you two days to get that shit out so that the taxi company didn't bitch. You never saw the fair again. But it wasn't long before you started noticing...changes. Like, you got angry really easy now. Like, you could run faster at the gym. And sometimes you could get people to do things for you, just by saying a word. And every so often, when you touch something, you get a vision. And you've been craving blood. That's the creepy, most terrifying part of this. You want blood. Not all the time, but certainly as much as you want to get laid, which in and of itself is freaky enough. You didn't even tell your significant other, they'd freak the hell out or think you were crazy. Hell, you weren't so certain you weren't crazy, until someone showed up at your cab one night and had a bit of a chat with you. He said he was a vampire, and before you could kick him out of the cab, he had you yanked out and pinned against a wall down the alley to set a few things straight. While you were busy shitting your pants, he explained about vampires, the Masquerade, this Camarilla thing, and how you were a vampire of Clan Brujah. You weren't even sure any of this made any sense, but you didn't fight it. He told you to meet him at the next "elysium", whatever that mean, so you could meet the "prince". That, as a matter of fact, turned out to be a chick, even if you still called her "prince", and there were a whole host of scary people there, all claiming to be vampires. You aren't sure if they are insane, or maybe it's you, but they freaked you the fuck out. You've avoided going back ever since. You try to go about your everyday life, driving your taxi, trying to pay your bills, eating your carne asada fries, and ignoring that lingering lust for the substance you pretend you don't want. Most of the time, you suceed, and no one else seems to notice you are a vampire. Maybe you aren't, and this is all a horrible, horrible mistake on the part of these crazy people. Whatever the case, you've been told by Dario Silva (the scary man who showed that one night) you have to be at the next Elysium. So you show up and skulk around and the shit hits the fan, the Prince flees after the Tremere Primogen tries to kill her and she and her brood book out of there.  You decide your done with San Diego and are gonna head a bit north (especially as you are pretty sure without the Prince that means that the Sabbat are going to come over the border any night now.  So you got the contact info for thre Brujah Primogen and the Scourge (hes a Brujah) from that Hal Harrison guy (gangrel sheriff visiting San Diego from LA) and decided to move farther north.  For now.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
He is the current Primogen of the LA Brujah
Hal is the Sheriff of LA.
Find a Home for yourself, and a neighborhood and life that means, carne asada fries are on the menu in your house.

Figure out what the hell your going to do, you can deny it as much as you want but your a vampire, and while the Camarilla are a holes, the Sabbat are monsters, and what you hear about the Asians makes them come off as freaking alien
